feature: SEC-3 synthetic/test bucket and evidence boundaries
summary: Workstream 2: Artifact Labeling (W2-05). Delivery inventory API endpoint filters by objectStorageClassification and evidenceClassification query parameters. Frontend DeliveryInventory component renders classification filter controls and passes them to the API. Test proves server-side filtering works for matching and non-matching classifications.
assertions: Delivery inventory API accepts objectStorageClassification query parameter
Delivery inventory API accepts evidenceClassification query parameter
Delivery inventory API filters server-side when classification matches
Delivery inventory API returns empty results when classification does not match
Frontend DeliveryInventory component renders classification filter controls
Frontend passes classification filters as query parameters to the API

implementation_items: SEC3-I-W2-05: frontend surfaces for classification filtering via API
